response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned generalist with nearly two decades of software experience, strong TypeScript depth, and directly relevant recent exposure to MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI solutions, and his AI-specific experience spans roughly one year; there is no evidence of Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or designing AI systems on cloud platforms at scale. For a staff-level, customer-facing GenAI delivery role, the core AI qualifications gap is too large despite his solid engineering craftsmanship.
strengths: Hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) and agentic-workflow infrastructure work, directly matching a key technology in the role
18+ years of broad production engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, with strong TypeScript and Node.js
Proven mentorship and communication skills through workshops, conference talks, and multi-day courses, relevant to customer-facing technical leadership
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions; AI-related work only began around April 2025
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation/observability, or Python
No evidence of leading enterprise customer discovery or transitioning AI prototypes to production, the core responsibilities of a forward deployed staff role

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG, vector database, and Python skills
